lessons.title: Secret Trusts Fully Secret and Half-Secret Trusts
lessons.description: A secret trust arises where a testator leaves property to a person in their will — apparently as an outright gift — but has communicated to that person, outside the will, that the property is to be held on trust for a third party.

lessons.title: Mutual Wills
lessons.description: What are mutual wills? Mutual wills are wills made by two persons — typically spouses — pursuant to an agreement that both will make wills in agreed terms and that neither will revoke their will without the consent of the other.
